overall.description: Gameplay footage from a video game (GTA V) showing nighttime driving through an industrial warehouse district, stopping at traffic signs, and transitioning to a waterfront area with a illuminated city skyline. The camera follows a vehicle through urban streets before ending on a palm-lined coastal road.

events.description: approaching stop sign behind a white van

agents.ego_description: following a white utility van through industrial streets with warehouses on the left

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead and slowing to stop at the intersection

entered.detail: large metal-sided industrial buildings with loading docks
white utility van with roof rack and ladder
wooden utility poles lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving through an industrial warehouse district at night, following a white van along a two-lane road. Streetlights cast a warm glow on the asphalt while large industrial buildings line the left side. The van ahead slows as it approaches a stop sign at the intersection.

events.description: vehicle comes to complete stop at red stop sign
white van proceeds through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at stop sign waiting for the white van ahead to clear the intersection

notable_agents.action: white van stopped at stop sign then accelerates through the intersection

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign mounted on metal pole

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a stop sign in the industrial district at night. The white van waits ahead at the intersection before proceeding. Streetlights illuminate the scene while distant city lights become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse district street with parked vehicles

events.description: accelerating through the intersection after stop
transitioning from industrial warehouses to palm-lined street approaching waterfront

agents.ego_description: driving through warehouse district streets with scattered pedestrians on sidewalks

entered.detail: low-rise industrial warehouses with metal siding and loading bays
tall palm trees becoming visible along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: Proceeding through the intersection and driving past warehouse buildings on both sides. The industrial architecture gives way to palm trees lining the street as the vehicle approaches a waterfront area. Parked vehicles line the right side of the road while scattered pedestrians walk along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront intersection with city skyline view and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: stopping at crosswalk to allow pedestrians to cross the street
multiple pedestrians crossing the street in both directions

agents.ego_description: stopped at crosswalk observing pedestrians crossing and taking photos of the illuminated city skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crouching down to take a photograph of the city skyline
pedestrian standing on sidewalk corner talking on mobile phone

entered.detail: illuminated downtown skyscrapers visible across the water with bright lights
white striped pedestrian crosswalk markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a waterfront crosswalk with a spectacular view of the illuminated city skyline across the water. Pedestrians are actively crossing the street, with some pausing to take photographs of the skyline. Palm trees line both sides of the wide intersection while the warm glow of streetlights mixes with the distant city illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal palm-lined road with beach access

events.description: turning right onto coastal road running parallel to the beach
transitioning from urban intersection to beachside coastal road

agents.ego_description: driving along the coastal road with sandy beach visible to the right and palm trees lining the left

entered.detail: sandy beach area with large rocks and red curb bordering the road
large boulders scattered along the sandy shoreline

segments.scene_description: Turning onto a scenic coastal road with the illuminated city skyline now visible to the left across the water. The sandy beach and large coastal rocks line the right side of the road while tall palm trees create a canopy on the left. The vehicle proceeds along this waterfront route away from the busy intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nighttime industrial district that gradually opens into a scenic, illuminated waterfront landscape. It begins by following a white van along a two-lane road lined with large warehouses, slowing to a halt at a stop sign under the warm glow of streetlights. As the vehicle proceeds through the intersection, the industrial architecture gives way to palm trees and parked cars, shifting the environment toward a more urban coastal area. The scene then expands at a wide waterfront crosswalk where pedestrians gather to photograph a spectacular city skyline shimmering across the water. Finally, the camera turns onto a coastal road, moving away from the busy intersection as the city lights remain to the left and sandy beaches with large rocks line the right.
